rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Gov't Code §2259.031, which governs governmental self-insurance funds. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 2259.031. ESTABLISHMENT OF FUND. (a) A governmental unit may establish a self-insurance fund to protect the governmental unit and its officers, employees, and agents from any insurable risk or hazard.
_note: Rule text concerns governmental self-insurance funds; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict exists.
